description: Enable admins to invite, manage roles, revoke access, and review membership audit history.

userStories.title: Add membership audit-log persistence
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want membership changes stored as audit events so that administrative actions are traceable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create audit-log storage for membership events including actor, target member, action, and timestamp
Define event types for invite_sent, role_changed, and access_revoked
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Invite workspace members by email
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that new collaborators can join without database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide admin action to create an invitation for a valid email address
Invitation flow assigns requested role (viewer, editor, or admin) and sends invite notification/email hook
Successful invite writes invite_sent membership audit event
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Change workspace member roles
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change member roles so that access level matches responsibilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide admin action to change role between viewer, editor, and admin
Role changes update membership record and enforce role enum validation
Successful role change writes role_changed membership audit event
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Revoke workspace member access
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke member access so that former collaborators no longer access workspace data.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide admin action to remove member workspace access by membership id
Revocation removes access immediately from authorization checks
Successful revocation writes access_revoked membership audit event
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Show recent membership changes in settings audit view
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes on the settings page so that I can audit who changed access.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings page renders recent membership audit events sorted newest first
Audit view shows action type, actor, target member, and timestamp columns
Audit view limits to workspace scope and paginates or caps result count for performance
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
